btn_go_to_shop: Go to the shop → next round
btn_menu_title: Return to the home screen and player configuration
celebration_banner: CELEBRATION — Press SPACE (or click) to continue
color_picker_help_1: Select the color of each tank. Dots with a red cross (✕) and dimmed are already chosen by other players (mutual exclusion).
color_picker_help_2: A real-time miniature preview of the tank is displayed to the left of each player.
color_unavailable_title: Color already selected by another player
controls_body: ← → angle • ↑ ↓ power • SPACE or click to fire • A/E switch weapon
controls_explanation: Each round is last-man-standing (continues until only one remains); shop opens after each round
legal_footer: © 2026 Bestter. All Rights Reserved. Released under MIT License.
next_round_note: Next round: new terrain and new positions
retro_subtitle:
Artillery combat • 100% destructible terrain (custom heightmap)
2 to 4 players • Humans or AI • 16-color VGA palette
shop_instructions: Use + to buy, − to sell (full refund)

desc.GRENADE: Bouncing grenade - useful on rough terrain
desc.NUKE: Baby Nuke - heavy damage + wide crater
desc.THERMONUCLEAR: Thermonuclear Bomb - destroys ~1/4 of the map, instant death at center + massive crater
desc.DRILLER: Driller - digs deep into the ground
desc.BULLET: Precision bullet - 3x damage on direct hit
